description_long: This is a set of modern tables featuring a rectangular coffee table and a nested set of three smaller side tables. The tabletops are made of dark-stained wood with a rich, natural grain, supported by minimalist black metal frames. The coffee table includes a lower shelf for additional storage or display, while the side tables are designed to nest neatly beneath each other for space efficiency. The overall design is sleek and functional, with clean lines and a contemporary urban aesthetic. The materials and construction suggest durability and suitability for high-traffic environments. This set would complement both residential and public urban spaces, such as lobbies, lounges, or sidewalk cafes.
description: A modern set of dark wood and black metal tables, including a rectangular coffee table with a shelf and three nested side tables. The design is sleek, functional, and well-suited for urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rectangular coffee table with a lower shelf on the left and the nested side tables on the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the coffee table and the compact nesting of the side tables.
description_view_2: Rear view with the side tables on the left and the coffee table on the right, emphasizing the open frame structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the full width of the coffee table and the alignment of the nested tables behind it.
